gyaan_in_5.name: Gyaan in 5
gyaan_in_5.description: Quick knowledge bites - science, history, psychology, amazing facts
sample_hooks: Kya aapko pata hai ki insaan ka dimaag raat ko zyada creative hota hai?
Ye fact sunke aapka dimaag hil jayega!
Duniya ka sabse ajeeb fact jo aaj tak kisi ne nahi bataya...
3 second mein ek aisi baat batata hoon jo aap zindagi bhar nahi bhoolenge
Ye cheez har din aapke saath hoti hai lekin aapko pata hi nahi!

tech_in_5_hindi.name: Tech in 5 Hindi
tech_in_5_hindi.description: Latest tech news, gadgets, AI updates, app recommendations
sample_hooks: Ye naya AI tool aapki job kha jayega!
iPhone ka ye hidden feature 99% logo ko nahi pata!
2026 ka sabse powerful phone sirf 15,000 mein?
Google ne launch kiya aisa feature jo sab badal dega!
Ye app install karo aur phone 2x fast ho jayega!

money_in_5.name: Money in 5
money_in_5.description: Money tips, investing, saving hacks, financial literacy
sample_hooks: 500 daily bachao aur 5 saal mein crorepati bano!
Ye galti ki toh aapka paisa doob jayega!
Ameer log ye 3 cheezein karte hain jo gareeb nahi karte
SIP mein ye mistake mat karna warna pachtaoge!
20 saal ki umar mein ye karo, 40 mein retire ho jaoge!

superhuman_60s.name: Superhuman 60s
superhuman_60s.description: Productivity hacks, habits, mindset, time management in 60 seconds
sample_hooks: Ye 1 habit follow karo aur life change ho jayegi!
5 AM club join karne ka asli secret ye hai!
Elon Musk ka ye trick use karo - 10x productive bano!
Phone uthane se pehle ye karo - din set ho jayega!
60 seconds mein seekho kaise focus 3x badhaye!

horror_ki_kahani.name: Horror Ki Kahani
horror_ki_kahani.description: Short horror stories, paranormal experiences, creepy facts
sample_hooks: Raat 3 baje jab wo darwaza apne aap khula...
Us kamre mein jo dikha wo kisi ko nahi dikhta...
Ye sachi ghatna hai - sunke neend ud jayegi!
Is gaon mein raat ko koi nahi jaata... kyunki...
Mere dost ne wo photo kheechi aur phir...

pyaar_ka_psychology.name: Pyaar Ka Psychology
pyaar_ka_psychology.description: Relationship psychology, love tips, attraction science
sample_hooks: Agar wo ye 3 cheezein kare toh wo aapse pyaar karta hai!
Breakup ke baad ye galti KABHI mat karna!
Ladkiyan secretly ye dekhti hain ladkon mein...
Psychologically kisi ko attract karne ka #1 tarika!
Agar wo ignore kare toh ye karo - 100% kaam karega!

zeheela_sach.name: Zeheela Sach
zeheela_sach.description: Dark facts, disturbing truths, hidden realities
sample_hooks: Ye sach jaanke aap raat ko so nahi paoge!
Duniya ka sabse zeheela insaan jo aaj bhi free hai...
Ye company secretly aapka data bech rahi hai!
History ka sabse dark chapter jo textbooks mein nahi hai!
Ye food daily khate ho lekin ye sach nahi jaante!

apna_haq.name: Apna Haq
apna_haq.description: Legal rights, consumer protection, workplace rights
sample_hooks: Police ye nahi kar sakti - ye hai aapka haq!
Boss agar ye kare toh seedha case karo!
Ye 3 rights har Indian ko pata hone chahiye!
Dukandaar ne cheating ki? Ye karo - paisa wapas!
Agar arrest ho jaao toh PEHLE ye bolo!

agar_aisa_ho_toh.name: Agar Aisa Ho Toh
agar_aisa_ho_toh.description: Hypothetical scenarios, what-if questions, thought experiments
sample_hooks: Agar dharti ulta ghoomne lage toh kya hoga?
Agar insaan 1000 saal jee sake toh?
Agar kal se internet band ho jaye toh?
Agar aap 100 saal pehle paida hote toh?
Agar gravity 1 minute ke liye gayab ho jaye toh?
